title: Senior Financial Analyst - Upstox - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Upstox - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!
